scope_summary: Capture one bounded BusinessFlow-to-FireFlow handoff slice for the healthy AFF path. Focus on same-window evidence around SSOLogin.php, SuiteLoginSessionValidation.php, AFF_COOKIE, BFCookie, /FireFlow/api/session, /fa/environment/getAFASessionInfo, and /afa/external//bridge/refresh. Prefer preserved source snippets and exact log windows that narrow the initiating BusinessFlow-side caller or cookie handoff before FireFlow resolves or refreshes the AFA session.
